title: Favored Visuals
description: A complete revamp of Minecraft's mechanics and lighting visuals along with a rehaul of Vanilla Plus.
body:
**WARNING! PLEASE ALLOCATE ATLEAST 6.0 GB OF JAVA MEMORY TO THIS OR IT WILL CRASH UPON BOOT. THANKS FOR PLAYING!**

_________________________________________________________________________________________________

Are you tired of the same ol' boring Minecraft lighting?
Are you looking for an improvement to the lighting without using shaders?
Well this is the modpack for you!


Favored Visuals is a visual overhaul of Minecraft that recreates the feeling of multiple fan favorite addons/mods! Though, it doesn't just add visuals, it revamps the entire game to match it along with the visuals, creating a Vanilla Plus atmosphere that feels extremely polished!

These features include:
- Custom Atmosphere
- New structures
- Player animations
- Mob animations
- New lighting
- New particle effects
- New mechanics
- And much more!
